title: Horror Element Mod
description: This mod adds gore and horror themed blocks for your horror maps as well as horror themed structures spawning naturally for your survival worlds
body:
## Welcome to the official Modrinth port page of Minecraft's Horror Element mod
## 
_This mod currently adds :_

-over 60 unique horror themed blocks such as blood, severed heads, bodies...

-utility and redstone blocks to add ambiance to your world such as flickering lights, atmosphere blocks, red lanterns...

-a LOT of new horror themed structures that will generate in you world

You can use HEm in creative mode to make your horror maps extra spooky, or in survival mode to add a dark ambiance to your explorations

![picture of the herobrine sanctum structure, including the decapitated steve block and the herobrine skull block](https://i.ibb.co/kYPqKDF/herobrine-sanctum.png)

You can include this mod in your modpacks, no need to ask. Please just insert a link to this page in your project, and mention that it's not yours. Any review on this mod would be greatly appreciated and could even be showcased on this page. Enjoy !
